default.text: ⟦⟦ S̃m̃ãl̃l̃ ĩñãc̃c̃ũr̃ãc̃ĩẽs̃ c̃ãñ ãc̃c̃ũm̃ũl̃ãt̃ẽ õṽẽr̃ t̃ĩm̃ẽ. ⟧⟧

error_chain.text: ⟦⟦ Ẽr̃r̃õr̃s̃ m̃ãỹ c̃l̃ũs̃t̃ẽr̃ ĩf̃ r̃ẽc̃õṽẽr̃ỹ ĩs̃ l̃ĩm̃ĩt̃ẽd̃. ⟧⟧

late_chart_pressure.text: ⟦⟦ P̃r̃ẽs̃s̃ũr̃ẽ c̃ãñ ĩñc̃r̃ẽãs̃ẽ t̃õw̃ãr̃d̃ t̃h̃ẽ l̃ãt̃ẽ s̃ẽc̃t̃ĩõñs̃. ⟧⟧
